title: Concept for a partial automation for greenhouse air conditioning in dry-hot summer climate zone
description: A technical concept for partial automation of greenhouse climate control in dry-hot summer zones using a thermo-chemical carrier fluid system for air conditioning, dehumidification, and heat recovery. The document outlines design principles, calculation models, greenhouse prototype planning, and component testing from a lab-scale facility in Tunis to a field demonstrator in Ariana, Tunisia.
